Price's key idea was to define $ q_{i}^{\prime} $ as the frequency of all descendants that have category i as their ancestor Note, in particular, that $ q_{i}^{\prime} $ is not the frequency of descendants in category i, but rather the fraction of all descendants that are from ancestors in category i.
